task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Data Manager application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'North Creek Lift Station' facility record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A facility details screen or form is open within CAMEO Data Manager with 'North Creek Lift Station' displayed as the facility name.

task_completion.description: Update the facility status to unmanned
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field related to staffing or 'Manned' status is visible and modified. The 'Manned' checkbox should be unchecked, or an 'Unmanned' option should be selected.

task_completion.description: Document the location of the emergency plans
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field related to the location of emergency plans contains the exact text 'Public Works HQ, 100 Municipal Way'.
Evidence that the changes have been saved, such as the cursor clicking a 'Save' or 'OK' button, a confirmation dialog, or the application returning to the facility list view.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface, rather than terminal windows executing scripts or commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is the genuine CAMEO Data Manager software, not a text editor, web browser, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly edit the database file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not open the cameo_data.mdb file directly in a database viewer (like MS Access) or use SQL commands to bypass the application GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager (v4.51) is a real EPA/NOAA application running on Windows 11. The facility 'North Creek Lift Station' is a synthetic test record. The 'Manned' field is a standard EPCRA Tier II field used to designate unmanned status (likely a checkbox). The emergency plans location is a custom field in this environment. The agent must use the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to make these changes, not edit the underlying cameo_data.mdb database file directly.
